zh.lifeSummary: Johann Martin Stober是Martin Stober和Anna的兒子，於1605年11月21日出生在德國巴登貝爾可薩赤 卡爾茲盧利多爾申姆。他於大約1624年與Anna Catherina Wolf在德國巴登貝爾可薩赤 卡爾茲盧斯塔福特結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於1682年3月20日在德國巴登貝爾可薩赤 卡爾茲盧林肯海姆享年76歲。

巴登貝爾可薩赤 卡爾茲盧斯塔福特

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Johann Martin Stober是Martin Stober和Anna的儿子，于1605年11月21日出生在德国巴登貝爾可薩赤 卡爾茲盧利多爾申姆。他于大约1624年与Anna Catherina Wolf在德国巴登貝爾可薩赤 卡爾茲盧斯塔福特结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他去世于1682年3月20日在德国巴登貝爾可薩赤 卡爾茲盧林肯海姆享年76岁。

nameMeanings.name: Stober
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German (also Stöber): from Middle High German stöuber ‘hunting dog’, for a hunter or for a curious, restless person.

Germanized form of Sorbian Stobor: from the Old Sorbian personal name Stobor, derived from the imperative stoj ‘stand, stay’ (later interpreted as if derived from sto ‘hundred’) + the element bor ‘to fight’.

variants.name: Stoeber
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Willi.

variants.name: Stoebner
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Darrold, Helmuth.
German (also Stöbner): variant of Stöber (see Stober ). The surname Stoebner or Stöbner is very rare in Germany.

variants.name: Stover
meanings: North German (Stöver): from Middle Low German (bad)stover ‘bather, barber, worker at a public bathhouse’, mainly an occupational name, but occasionally perhaps a nickname for a dedicated bather. Compare Stoever .
English: variant of   Stopher   with intervocalic voicing of /f/ to /v/.

nameMeanings.name: Johann
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: John
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

nameMeanings.name: Martin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the Latin name Martinus. This was probably originally derived from Mars (genitive Martis), the name of the Roman god of war (and earlier of fertility). Martin became very popular in the Middle Ages, especially on the Continent, as a result of the fame of St Martin of Tours . He was born the son of a Roman officer in Upper Pannonia (an outpost of the Roman Empire, now part of Hungary), and, although he became a leading figure in the 4th-century Church, he is chiefly remembered now for having divided his cloak in two and given half to a beggar. The name was also borne by five popes, including one who defended Roman Catholic dogma against Eastern Orthodox theology. He died after suffering imprisonment and privations in Naxos and public humiliation in Constantinople, and was promptly acclaimed a martyr by supporters of the Roman Church. Among Protestants, the name is sometimes bestowed in honour of the German theologian Martin Luther ( 1483–1546 ); Martin was used as a symbolic name for the Protestant Church in satires by both Dryden and Swift. A further influence may be its use as the given name of the civil-rights leader Martin Luther King ( 1929–68 ).

en.lifeSummary: Johann Martin Stober was born on 21 November 1605, in Liedolsheim, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden, Germany as the son of Martin Stober and Anna. He married Anna Catherina Wolf about 1624, in Staffort, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden, Germany. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died on 20 March 1682, in Linkenheim, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden, Germany, at the age of 76.

ja.lifeSummary: Johann Martin Stoberは1605年11月21日にドイツバデンベズイルクサムト カルルスルヘリードルシェイムでMartin StoberとAnnaの息子として生まれた。約1624年にドイツバデンベズイルクサムト カルルスルヘスタフォートでAnna Catherina Wolfと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は1682年3月20日にドイツバデンベズイルクサムト カルルスルヘリンケンヘイムで76歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Johann Martin Stober(은)는 1605년 11월 21일 독일 바든 베지르크샘트 칼스루헤 리도셰임에서 Martin Stober(와)과 Anna의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 대략 1624년 독일 바든 베지르크샘트 칼스루헤 스태포트에서 Anna Catherina Wolf(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1682년 3월 20일 독일 바든 베지르크샘트 칼스루헤 링켄하임에서 76세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Johann Martin Stober родился 21 ноября 1605 г. в местности лиедолшим, безирксэмт карлсрух, баден, Германия. Его родителей звали Martin Stober и Anna. Он женился на женщине по имени Anna Catherina Wolf около 1624 г. в местности стаффорт, безирксэмт карлсрух, баден, Германия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер 20 марта 1682 г. в местности линкеним, безирксэмт карлсрух, баден, Германия в возрасте 76 лет.
